concept.core_loop: Turn-based arcane duel: each turn draw 5 spell cards, spend 3 mana to cast fire/ice/lightning cards against a telegraphed enemy, then end turn and the enemy acts. The live decision each turn is solving the enemy's telegraphed intent — set up Burn/Chill with fire/ice, then cash it in with lightning for bonus damage, while budgeting block vs offense. Between fights, pick 1 of 3 new cards to deepen the deck. Difficulty ramps across a ~5-node run (combat, combat, rest, elite+relic, boss). One excellent run, not endless.
mechanics: meta save: unlock 1 card + ascension toggle on boss win
concept.art_direction: Arcane-sigil SVG vector: deep indigo/violet base; element-accented spell cards (fire amber/orange, ice cyan/white, lightning electric-yellow/violet); runic circles, mana crystals, glowing sigils, glyph-bordered card frames with a cost gem and per-element sigil; a wide arcane-chamber background (indigo->violet gradient, glowing floor runic circle, floating motes) composed for the 1280x720 frame; distinct enemy silhouettes (imp, frost-wraith, golem, boss archmage). Feedback: cards arc to center on cast, number pop-ups, enemy hit-flash + screen shake scaled to damage, status icons with stack counts, enemy death dissolve.
concept.differentiation_notes: A tight, hand-crafted vertical-slice deckbuilder built around one discoverable hook — fire/ice set up a status, lightning cashes it in — rather than a wide card pool. Landscape-native (the project's first non-portrait title), so the fanned hand and card frames read large.

theme.premise: a lone mage's arcane duel through a sequence of monsters, casting elemental spell cards
theme.setting: a candle-lit arcane duelling chamber ringed with glowing runes

visual_system.world_bible: One candle-lit arcane duelling chamber of indigo-violet stone ringed with glowing runes (theme.setting), rendered as flat-bold cartoon. The four enemies are one summoned-monster family read by silhouette + element: imp (small horned bat-winged fire/amber), frost_wraith (tall hooded floating shroud, ice/cyan), golem (broad violet-stone construct with a glowing belt-core), archmage boss (robed sorcerer, pointed hat, rune-staff, lightning/violet). Spell cards are FIRST-PERSON CASTER POV — the spell leaving the mage's own outstretched hands inside the chamber — so each card reads as performing its ability (a TCG-hero throughline) rather than as an abstract sigil.
visual_system.stroke: checkpoint-native thick clean cartoon outlines + bold cel shading (Cartoon Arcadia XL); no hand-authored stroke
visual_system.form: full-bleed OPAQUE card illustrations (no painted frame — all chrome is code-drawn at runtime), composed as first-person caster POV; organic flat-cartoon creature silhouettes, one signature each (imp horns+wings+tail, wraith hood+shroud, golem belt-core, archmage hat+staff)
visual_system.shading: flat bold cel shading with vibrant local colour + soft glow on magical effects — Cartoon Arcadia native, one model everywhere
visual_system.scale: cards full-bleed at the 120x160 hand footprint / 140x190 reward footprint (masters ~768x1024, downscaled, mipmapped); enemies bottom-anchored on the floor line at ~350px (runtime scale, hitboxes untouched); background opaque full-frame 1280x720 (exact viewport aspect)
visual_system.prompt_scaffold: shared style fragment 'flat bold cartoon, clean thick outlines, vibrant cel shading, stylized modern arcane' + for CARDS a first-person caster-POV framing of the named spell leaving the hands in the chamber; for ENEMIES 'single centered subject, full body, clean transparent background'. Shared negatives: IP guards (logo, watermark, text, trademarked character, brand, celebrity likeness) + anti-realism (photorealistic, hyperrealistic, 3d render, octane render) + anti-scene for sprites (scene, multiple characters, frame, border, ground, shadow) + Western-not-anime (anime, manga).

style.style_prompt: flat bold cartoon, clean thick outlines, vibrant cel shading, stylized modern arcane

reskinned: card art: 16 full-bleed first-person caster-POV spell illustrations (arcane_bolt, ward, meditate, mana_surge, ember, flame_lash, immolate, wildfire, frost_shard, glacial_wall, freeze, blizzard, spark, chain_lightning, overload, thunderclap)
enemy:imp/frost_wraith/golem/archmage (4 flat-cartoon silhouettes; flash=overbright modulate pass, enrage=scale-pop, dissolve=alpha)
card_back (rune card-back for draw/discard pile stacks)
painted UI tokens: token_mana (mana crystal), token_shield (block shield), token_plate (medallion icon/value backing)
themed display font ui_font.ttf (Lilita One) wired project-wide (draw_string + Label overrides) so digits aren't ThemeDB-fallback programmer-art

element pips: per-element painted glyph on the card medallion (fire=flame, ice=shard, lightning=icon_lightning bolt, neutral=gem) replacing the single iridescent gem on every card — the pip now signals element by shape+colour (accessibility + fidelity)
warm/cool status discs: amber halo+tint for Burn, cyan for Chill, so the two shared-plate medallions read warm-vs-cool at a glance (was the same violet disc)
RUN-LAYER backgrounds: bg_map / bg_shop / bg_event / bg_campfire (raster, opaque full-frame 1280x720, no LayerDiffuse) drawn under each new deepen-pass screen, replacing the gradient-band primitive
merchant (hooded shopkeeper-mage sprite, ShopView left margin)
prop_campfire (painted bonfire, CampfireView — replaces the procedural flame/log/ember primitive)

6 relic icons (storm_core/iron_ward/arcane_battery/vitality_charm/gold_idol/lucky_coin) in the ShopView relic panel + CombatView HUD; with the existing ember_heart this completes the 7-relic painted set
7 map node-type emblems (node_combat/elite/boss/event/shop/campfire/treasure) as MapView markers, replacing the coloured-disc primitives
ShopView card sale tiles reuse the 16 full-bleed first-person caster-POV card_<id> illustrations as full-bleed faces (code name-strip + cost-badge scrims over them)
left_primitive: all juice/motion (screen shake, card-cast arc ghost, number pop-ups, death dissolve+particles, HP/mana tweens, status pulses, intent telegraph) — motion not art

ALL HUD/overlay chrome is DELIBERATE styled code, composited over the painted art so one renderer serves every card/state: the HUD plate (gradient body + accent strip + bevel + corner ticks), End Turn/Skip buttons (gradient + gloss + bevel), win/lose/reward banner panels, HP bars (player+enemy), the per-card legibility panels + name/type/effect text + element border + cost badge, and the MANA ORBS (bright radial code orb — the generated mana token rendered too dark/muddy). A painted 9-slice gold frame over these was tried this pass and owner-rejected in live play as lumpy/janky (generation will not yield a clean symmetric tileable frame) — clean styled code is the right call for wide dynamic UI chrome.
pile-count + status-count numerals, intent value, reward/win/lose overlay text — runtime values drawn on solid backing pills / tight outlines over the painted assets

RUN-LAYER UI chrome is DELIBERATE styled CODE via the new Chrome.gd shared helper (vscrim vertical-gradient button + top gloss + bevel, HP-gauge fill, solid label pills) mirroring CombatView's chrome so every run-layer screen reads as one designed hand: event/campfire/shop buttons, campfire HP gauge, map connector edges + current/available rings, map node-label pills, and the shop gold counter (⬡ glyph). Wide dynamic chrome is a genuine medium-fight for raster gen — styled-code is the right tool (mixed-method honesty).

treasure_chest.png GENERATED but UNWIRED: the treasure node auto-grants a relic with no reveal screen, and adding one is a new game State (a logic change) — out of scope for a frozen-logic asset pass; left for a future deepen pass.
token_gold.png GENERATED but REJECTED: rendered as two stray figures rather than a coin; the ShopView gold counter uses the clean ⬡ coin glyph instead. token_gold is a regen candidate.
asset_pass.notes: METHOD CHANGED svg->raster: the earlier SVG sigil-vector pass was owner-rejected as not-shippable ('rudimentary, fine for POC'); raster is the project default and the right call for representational creature/spell art, so this asset_pass record was reconciled to the shipped raster reality. KEY STYLE FINDING: Juggernaut XL (photoreal base) fought the flat-cartoon target through ~9 imp + ~9 card regens (whack-a-mole; the chain_lightning abstract effect kept collapsing to scenes) — swapping the CHECKPOINT to cartoonArcadiaXL_v2 did what prompt-tuning couldn't and solved cross-asset cohesion for free (every asset inherits one hand). Cards reframed first-person caster-POV to stop abstract-effect collapse and tie each spell to the world. SWAP MECHANISM: draw_texture*-in-place in the builder's single-_draw immediate-mode renderer (textures load once in _ready, replace primitives in _draw_background/_draw_enemy/_draw_card_face/etc., preserving z-order+shake+juice); every helper guards on a null texture and falls back to the primitive. Grain fixed via mipmaps/generate=true on every downscaled .import + TEXTURE_FILTER_LINEAR_WITH_MIPMAPS. Painted UI-token pass (mana/shield/plate + 6 icons + card-back + relic) holds code-drawn chrome to the painted-art bar. COMPOSITED + COLOUR-ACCESSIBILITY AUDIT (this pass, busy-state + reward-overlay screenshots, 3-4x magnified pairing crops): fixed block-value numeral contrast (was near-black on the shield's dark boss -> bright), added a solid backing pill behind the reward-overlay title (was gold-on-busy), pushed Burn/Chill count numerals clear of their medallion plates onto small backing pills (+ wider status spacing), and solidified the enemy name/intent/HP panel (0.66->0.82) over the bright runic portal; re-render re-audit clean. selftest still SELFTEST OK (rules untouched). RECIPE PROVENANCE: comfy.mjs takes the recipe JSON as a CLI arg and does not persist it, and the final Cartoon Arcadia recipes were not logged during the iterative probe, so exact per-asset seeds/negatives are unrecoverable; the committed PNGs are canonical (GPU gen is non-deterministic anyway). The recipes[] below record the locked checkpoint + proven params + per-asset subject as honest partial provenance (seed omitted where uncaptured); the full locked style profile lives in visual_system.style/prompt_scaffold. || VISUAL-AUDIT + TARGETED RASTER REGEN PASS (2026-06-04): the visual-audit skill graded the composited screen across all 5 states (busy combat / boss / reward / win / lose) via fresh per-lens auditors. CHROME-CODE fixes (logic frozen, SELFTEST OK): HP-bar value is now an OUTLINED numeral (no opaque pill punching a gap into the green fill — the segmented-bar bug, worst at boss 88/110); block-shield numerals white+heavy-outline (were grey-on-silver after the shield-token swap); status counts on solid pills + wider disc spacing (were touching the neighbour); reward screen draws ONLY bg+modal (the live combat header was bleeding through the scrim). ASSET-PRODUCTION fixes (owner chose full painted 9-slice): per-element card pips (icon_lightning bolt + reused flame/shard/gem) so the pip signals element by shape+colour instead of one rainbow gem; warm/cool element halo+tint on the Burn/Chill medallions; and a painted GOLD 9-SLICE FRAME (token_frame_gold) drawn via a manual nine-patch (_draw_nine_patch) over code fills, wrapping the HUD panel, win/lose banners, and End/Skip buttons. MIXED-METHOD HONESTY: wide dynamic UI chrome (HP-bar gauge, per-card legibility panels) fights LayerDiffuse generation (probes: black-box alpha button, emblem-in-center panel, 2-line hollow gauge) so they stay styled-code by design. Re-rendered + re-audited with fresh eyes after each fix; final sweep clean (mana orbs lifted to clear the new gold bottom rail). New PNGs: icon_lightning, token_frame_gold. || FRAME REVERT (2026-06-04, owner live-playtest feedback): the full painted 9-slice gold frame (token_frame_gold over code fills on HUD/buttons/banners) looked lumpy/janky in-game — asymmetric corners, uneven rails, stuck-on studs — because LayerDiffuse/SDXL will not yield a clean symmetric tileable UI frame. Owner chose to REVERT all panels/buttons/banners to the prior clean styled-code chrome (which sits cleanly); token_frame_gold deleted. ALSO this pass: mana orbs reverted from the painted token_mana (rendered dark/muddy on the dark panel) to a bright radial CODE orb (per the project gen-renders-mana-dark finding), and the HP-bar value outline tightened (spread 0.6) so it is not chunky. RETAINED wins from the regen attempt: per-element card pips (icon_lightning bolt + reused flame/shard/gem so the pip signals element by shape+colour) and the warm/cool Burn/Chill status medallions. LESSON: wide dynamic UI chrome (panels, buttons, bars) is a genuine medium-fight for raster gen — keep it styled-code (mixed-method honesty); reserve raster tokens for centered-subject art (cards, enemies, small element glyphs). selftest still SELFTEST OK. || RUN-LAYER ART PASS (2026-06-05): extended the locked Cartoon Arcadia XL system to the deepen-pass run layer (4 new screens: Map/Shop/Event/Campfire). 21 PNGs generated (BATCH 21/21) on the same checkpoint + euler/24/cfg7 scaffold (LayerDiffuse for sprites/icons, opaque sdxl for the 4 backgrounds): 4 backgrounds, merchant + bonfire props, 7 node emblems, 6 relics (completing the 7-relic set with the existing ember_heart). Wired draw_texture*-in-place into MapView/ShopView/EventView/CampfireView (backgrounds + node icons + merchant + relic panel + bonfire); shop sale tiles reuse the full-bleed card_<id> POV art; CombatView._tex_relic extended to all 7. mipmaps/generate=true + LINEAR_WITH_MIPMAPS on all 21. NEW Chrome.gd shared styled-chrome helper (vscrim gradient button + gloss + bevel + HP gauge + solid label pills) mirrors CombatView so run-layer chrome is one hand (CombatView untouched). COMPOSITED VISUAL-AUDIT (4 fresh per-lens auditors -> fix -> re-render -> fresh re-audit): chrome-code fixes — event/campfire/shop buttons flat-slab->styled; campfire HP bar->styled gauge; map node labels->solid pills in a top-most pass (were shadow-only, washing out over the bright archway); event title/body panels->solid (were translucent, bright bg bled through); map edges thickened + inset to connect ring-to-ring (were hairlines, briefly overdrew icons after thickening); locked map nodes value-dropped + available nodes brighter double-halo (colour-accessibility: was hue-only). Re-audit: all prior findings RESOLVED, no regressions; legibility + colour lenses fully clean. DEFERRED (need GPU, ComfyUI offline): node_event regen (reads as a literal '?') + node_combat regen (crossed-blades reads thin) — minor polish, not blockers. REJECTED: token_gold (two stray figures) -> counter uses the glyph. UNWIRED: treasure_chest (no reveal screen exists; adding one is a logic change). selftest still SELFTEST OK (rules untouched). Status held playable (owner A/B playtest pending).

depth_pass.notes: STS-style run layer grown over an intact CombatState rules engine via the deepen skill. Branching MapGen graph navigated by choice (combat/elite/event/campfire/shop/treasure/boss); run-persistent HP; gold economy; merchant shop (buy card/relic + card removal); choice-driven events (EventDB); campfire (heal 30% or upgrade a card via CardDB UPGRADES); 7-relic pool with on_run_start/on_combat_start/on_combat_win hooks (RelicDB). Surfaced behavior-changes to previously-frozen logic: CombatState.setup gained an optional start_hp arg (run-persistent HP); storm_core relic given a real effect (+1 max mana; was a no-op). New screens (MapView/ShopView/EventView/CampfireView) wired by deepen; their composited look is visual-audit's job, not recorded here. Known limitation: vitality_charm on_run_start hook is dormant for mid-run-acquired copies (relics start as ember_heart only). selftest.gd Stages 5-14 are the new regression+proof assertions.
